name: Parmesan-Topped Fennel Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until tender; about 30 minutes.
2. Drain well.
3. Transfer to a mixing bowl and mash thoroughly.
4. Meanwhile, in another saucepan, combine the fennel with the broth and cook over medium heat until tender; about 15 minutes.
5. Drain and puree the fennel in a food processor.
6. Add the pureed fennel to the potatoes along with the milk and butter.
7. Transfer the mixture to an oven-proof casserole dish.
8. Top with Parmesan cheese and bread crumbs.
9. Brown under broiler for a few minutes.
